summary: Completed backend testing for Phase 10E Performance Optimization. Successfully tested N+1 query pattern fixes across 10 endpoints. 21/22 tests passed with 95.5% success rate. All critical endpoints return correct response structures without errors.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of expected 400 error for missing serial
minor_issues.impact: Minor - endpoint works but error handling differs from specification

passed_tests: GET /api/dashboard returns object with 41+ keys, monthlyData has 6 items
GET /api/dashboard/analytics returns object with weeklyThroughput (8 items)
GET /api/roles returns array (no error, each role has permissions array field)
GET /api/serial-list returns array (no error, empty array is fine)
GET /api/financial-recap returns object with financial fields
GET /api/distribusi-kerja returns object with hierarchy/flat/invalid_records keys
GET /api/vendor-material-inspections returns array with shipment_number, items, accessory_items fields
